query: SELECT gameId, side, pitcherName, pitcherHand, retrosheetId, mlbamId, kProj, bookLine, bookOverOdds, bookUnderOdds, pOver, pUnder, bestSide, verdict, bestEdge FROM mlb_strikeout_props WHERE gameId IN (2250007, 2250008, 2250009) ORDER BY gameId, side;
